headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Updates Call on ON Semiconductor Corp (ON) Stock
summary: ON Semiconductor Corp (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the best stocks to buy according to David Greenspan’s Slate Path Capital. The stock makes up 7.2% of the equity portfolio. ON Semiconductor stock is already up more than 60% year-to-date, and analysts see it rising more. On June 29, Cantor Fitzgerald lifted its price target on ON […]
